frame_analyses.description: Overview of FLS trainer box with red base, pink/purple transparent top, peg board visible with 6 foam objects positioned on left side, instructional text overlay in Spanish indicating task setup
frame_analyses.technique_notes: This is an instructional/educational setup frame showing the FLS peg transfer trainer configuration

frame_analyses.description: Hands-on demonstration showing person holding FLS trainer box at waist level outdoors, demonstrating proper trainer positioning and handling
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational demonstration of correct trainer orientation and body positioning during task

frame_analyses.description: Overhead view of peg board interior showing 12 black circular holes marked on a transparent base with Spanish text overlay 'Colocar discos en orificios' (Place disks in holes)
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instructional frame showing target hole locations for peg placement

frame_analyses.description: Close-up demonstration of cutting foam object in half with scissors and text 'Cortar al medio, Como ranura' (Cut in middle, like a slot), showing preparation of practice objects
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational content showing foam object preparation technique

frame_analyses.description: Demonstration of placing cut foam disks into holes on transparent trainer base with text 'Colocar discos en orificios' visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows proper insertion technique for foam objects into peg holes

frame_analyses.description: Demonstration of securing trainer with elastic bands on nails/pegs, text overlay 'Fijar tabla con bandas elásticas en los clavos' (Secure board with elastic bands on nails)
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows stabilization technique for the trainer during use

frame_analyses.description: Overhead view of secured trainer with elastic bands visible, showing final setup configuration
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final trainer configuration ready for task performance

frame_analyses.description: Display of laparoscopic instruments - plastic blue and white ligating loop/knot pusher tool shown in hands
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational display of endoloop equipment (not peg transfer instruments, appears to be mixed content from multiple FLS tasks)

frame_analyses.description: Demonstration of endoloop ligating device assembly with clear plastic backing showing proper handling technique
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instructional content for endoloop/ligating loop task assembly

frame_analyses.description: Setup display of FLS peg transfer trainer with foam objects and lighting setup, showing trainer positioned with LED light source visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational setup showing proper lighting and trainer configuration

frame_analyses.description: Close-up of LED light strip installation on peg transfer trainer with marker indicating light source location 'Marcar ubicación de fuente' (Mark light source location)
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instructional content on trainer illumination setup

frame_analyses.description: Final trainer setup with all components assembled - peg board visible with foam objects, secured with elastic bands, LED lighting installed

confidence_rationale: This is clearly an instructional/educational video with Spanish-language narration, text overlays, and demonstration content. It shows setup, preparation, and assembly of FLS peg transfer trainer equipment. No actual task performance is demonstrated, therefore no scoring is performed per rubric instructions.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper peg transfer trainer setup and assembly
Hole identification and peg placement technique
LED light source installation for visibility
Proper trainer positioning at waist level for ergonomics
verbal_cues: Marcar el tamaño de los orificios (Mark the size of the holes)
Cortar al medio, como ranura (Cut in middle, like a slot)
Colocar discos en orificios (Place disks in holes)
Pegar bordes, para evitar desplazamiento (Glue edges to prevent displacement)
Fijar tabla con bandas elásticas en los clavos (Secure board with elastic bands on nails)
Marcar ubicación de fuente (Mark light source location)
Instalar fuente: Pegar con sellador (Install light source: Glue with sealer)
common_errors_addressed: Improper foam object preparation - demonstrates correct cutting technique
Unstable trainer positioning - emphasizes elastic band securements and edge gluing
Poor visibility - shows LED light installation to improve visual field
Trainer displacement during use - addresses stabilization methods

improvement_suggestions: No performance assessment available - this is setup and preparation content only
